calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Ownership Of Trust Assets And For Order Compelling Production Of Information Regarding Trust Property And Authorizing And Direct
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Trust Assets And For Order Compelling Production Of Information Regarding Trust Property And Authorizing And Direct
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for Linda Amuso (Petitioner)
David Monsour for Philip Lombardi, Jr. (Respondent)

Mr. Monsour stated that the parties have reached settlement, are working out the terms, and need 30 days continuance. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Trust Assets, etc. is continued to May 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Trust Assets And For Order Compelling Production Of Information Regarding Trust Property And Authorizing And Direct
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Continued To Apr-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evan Winet for prtitioner Linda Amuso; Graham Dowds for Philip Lombardi, Jr.

Mr. Winet advised the Court that the parties have been in discussions to work matters out, and were jointly requesting a 30-day continuance. The matter was continued to April 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
